items.description:
RECOLORABLE Tung Sahur 🎨🪵 https://www.roblox.com/bundles/175231504449422

Join our group for more SWOLE avatars 👇
 https://www.roblox.com/communities/34641111/SW0LEFROG-UGC#!/store

Glorbo Fruttodrillo 🐊🍉 https://www.roblox.com/bundles/3237282341145

Udin Din dun 🏋️🍊 https://www.roblox.com/bundles/6767613395459

tung tung tung sahur!  🥁
Its sound resembles that of a beating drum, "tung tung tung." It was first discovered at Pentungan Sahur Pos Ronda Malam. 🌍
Although people mistaken it for an “Italian Brainrot Animal,” it's actually Indonesian Brainrot 💭
Sahur is known for wielding a signature wooden bat and can evolve into a second form, as seen in his fight with Brr brr Patapim. He is one of the most well known and most beloved brain rot characters, claiming many peoples top 1 spot in the unique rankings of brainrot animals 🏆

items.description: With a hint of Clockwork's unique style, these golden shades bring a subtle glow that adds a classic touch to any look. For those who appreciate a touch of luxury and a nod to Roblox history, this is the perfect accessory.
